name: Dock
description: Dock is a navigation component consisting of menuitems.

props.name: model
props.description: MenuModel instance to define the action items.

props.name: breakpoint
props.description: The breakpoint to define the maximum width boundary.

props.name: tooltipOptions
props.description: Whether to display the tooltip on items. The modifiers of Tooltip can be used like an object in it. Valid keys are 'event' and 'position'.

props.name: tabindex
props.description: Index of the element in tabbing order.

props.name: ariaLabelledby
props.description: Establishes relationships between the component and label(s) where its value should be one or more element IDs.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Establishes a string value that labels the component.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: focus
events.description: Callback to invoke when the component receives focus.

events.name: blur
events.description: Callback to invoke when the component loses focus.

slots.name: item
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Custom content for item. */ item: MenuItem; /** * Index of the menuitem */ index: number; /** * Label property of the menuitem */ label: string | ((...args: any) => string) | undefined; /** * Binding properties of the menuitem */ props: DockRouterBindProps; }): VNode[]

slots.name: icon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Custom content for item icon. */ item: MenuItem; }): VNode[]

slots.name: itemicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Custom content for item icon. */ item: MenuItem; }): VNode[]
